free_text: Measurements of fission yield in 8 MeV bremsstrahlung

wrapped with 0.025 cm thick super pure aluminum

wrapped with 0.025 mm thick aluminum foil)
Ta target was used as electron-photon

The half-life of 151Pm printed as 53.08 hr should
